allow: PowerShell(wsl --shutdown; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Temp" -Directory -Filter "????????-????-????-????-????????????" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { if \(Test-Path "$\($_.FullName\)\\swap.vhdx"\) { Remove-Item $_.FullName -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Removed stale temp dir: $\($_.Name\)" } }; "Done clearing temp")
PowerShell(wsl -d Ubuntu-24.04 -- bash -lc 'echo BOOT_OK; uname -r; free -h; swapon --show')

PowerShell(wsl -d Ubuntu-24.04 -- bash -lc 'grep -qxF '\\''export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"'\\'' ~/.bashrc || echo '\\''export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"'\\'' >> ~/.bashrc; grep -qxF '\\''export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"'\\'' ~/.profile || echo '\\''export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"'\\'' >> ~/.profile; echo "--- PATH entries added ---"; export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"; which claude && claude --version')
